title: Task Force Vengeance
content:
{{Top|leg|title=Task Force ''Vengeance''}} {{Fleet |image=[[File:Task-Force-Vengeance.jpg]] |name=Task Force ''Vengeance'' |type= |founder= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |headquarter= |location= |commander=[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn]] |officers= |crew= |flagship=[[Vengeance (Executor-class)|''Vengeance'']] |capital=*[[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] *[[Inexorable (Victory-class)|''Inexorable'']] *[[Stormhawk (Victory-class)|'' Stormhawk'']] |starfighters= |ground= |naval= |campaigns=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |battles=*[[Battle of Dega]] *[[Battle of Nocto]] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] }} The '''Task Force ''Vengeance''''' was a task force formed to pacify the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]]. It was headed by the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Vengeance (Executor-class)|''Vengeance'']] under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn]]. ==History== The naval unit commenced operations at roughly the same time that a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] task force centered on the cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] set up a new [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] in the [[Nocto system/Legends|Nocto system]]. These forces subsequently engaged in a long campaign. At the end the campaign against the Rebel forces, Admiral Senn and the ''Vengeance'' were destroyed by an intense Rebel attack. Both the Rebels and the Imperials in Airam were significantly damaged and left in a stalemate. Task Force ''Vengeance'' failed to destroy the Rebel presence in the Airam sector, or force the compliance of the Airam leaders. ==Ships under Senn's command== Below is a list of ships encountered by the ''Liberty'' task force in [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]] and [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood]] sectors, respectively. ===''Executor''-class Star Dreadnoughts=== *[[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|SSD]] [[Vengeance (Executor-class)|''Vengeance'']] - destroyed ===''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers=== *[[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|ISD]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] - destroyed **[[Avenger Squadron]] **Beta Squadron ***Later reformed into [[Talon Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Talon Squadron]] **Gamma Squadron ***Later reformed into Talon Squadron *ISD [[Nemesis (Task Force Vengeance)|''Nemesis'']] - part of [[Battlegroup Orion|Battlegroup ''Orion'']], destroyed *ISD [[Conqueror (Imperial-class)|''Conqueror'']] - part of Battlegroup ''Orion'', destroyed *ISD [[Wasp (Imperial-class)|''Wasp'']] - damaged *ISD [[Juggernaut (Star Destroyer)|''Juggernaut'']] - damaged *ISD [[Titan (Imperial-class)|''Titan'']] - damaged ===Victory-class Star Destroyers=== *[[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|VSD]] [[Inexorable (Victory-class)|''Inexorable'']] *VSD [[Judicator (Victory-class)|''Judicator'']] *VSD [[Stormhawk (Victory-class)|'' Stormhawk'']] - destroyed ===Immobilizer 418 cruisers=== *[[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|INT]] ''[[Compellor]]'' (captured by Rebels; later destroyed) ===''Strike''-class cruisers=== *[[Strike-class medium cruiser|STRKC]] [[Ironhand (Strike-class)|''Ironhand'']] - destroyed *STRKC [[Talon (Strike-class)|''Talon'']] - destroyed ===EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates=== *[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|FRG]] ''[[Damocles]]'' - damaged *FRG ''[[Pincer]]'' - destroyed *FRG [[Fang (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Fang'']] - destroyed *FRG [[Abolisher (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Abolisher'']] ===Nebulon-B2 frigates=== *[[Nebulon-B2 frigate|M/FRG]] [[Lightning (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Lightning'']] - damaged *M/FRG ''[[Harpy]]'' - destroyed *M/FRG [[Subjugator (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Subjugator'']] - destroyed ===Escort carriers=== *[[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|ESC]] [[Abolisher (escort carrier)|''Abolisher'']] - destroyed *ESC ''[[Hyperion]]'' - destroyed *ESC [[Tyrant (escort carrier)|''Tyrant'']] - destroyed ===CR90 corvettes=== *[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CRV]] [[1138 (CR90 corvette)|''1138'']] - destroyed *CRV ''[[Gotal (CR90 corvette)|Gotal 1]]'' - destroyed *CRV ''[[Gotal 2]]'' - destroyed *CRV ''327-B'' - destroyed *CRV ''327-C'' - destroyed ===''Assassin''-class corvettes=== *[[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|M/CRV]] ''327-A'' - destroyed *M/CRV ''[[337]]'' - destroyed *M/CRV ''[[124]]'' - destroyed ===Support ships=== *4 M/CRVs with troops and equipment - 1 destroyed *2 CRVs with troops - destroyed *At least 6 [[Modular conveyor]]s - 2 destroyed *3 [[Cargo ferry|cargo ferries]] - 1 destroyed *At least 9 [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] - 3 destroyed '''Task Force Total''': 53 vessels, minimum
'''Task Force Losses''': 27 vessels, minimum ''(not including fighter-sized and auxiliary craft)'' ==Behind the scenes== [[File:TF_Vengeance.jpg|right|thumb|Opening crawl of the campaign]] The Imperial campaign of ''Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power'' derives its name from this task force. Although the last missions are open ended (they can be played as either Rebels or Imperials), the ultimate outcome is not held to favor the Empire or the Rebellion. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' [[Category:Imperial task forces]] [[Category:Organizations of the Airam sector]]
